data.name: MAD1312_Description
data.value: Exceptions should be passed as first parameter for the stacktrace to be available in the logs.

data.name: MAD1312_Message
data.value: Exceptions should be passed as the first parameter to the log call.

data.name: MAD1312_Title
data.value: PassExceptionAsFirstParameter

data.name: MAD1727_Description
data.value: A named placeholder used with ILogger should be PascalCase, a naming convention where the first letter of each compound word in a name is capitalized. This naming convention is recommended for structured logging, where each named placeholder is used as a property name in the structured data.

data.name: MAD1727_Message
data.value: Use PascalCase for named placeholders

data.name: MAD1727_Title
data.value: UsePascalCaseForNamedPlaceholders

data.name: MAD2017_Description
data.value: The number of parameters supplied to the logging method should match the number of placeholders contained in the log message.

data.name: MAD2017_Message
data.value: Template parameter count does not match with supplied parameters. Expected {0} but got {1}.

data.name: MAD2017_Title
data.value: ParameterCountMismatch

data.name: MAD2023_Description
data.value: Logging message templates use curly braces { and } to denote named placeholders for values. Invalid brace usage in message templates can result in runtime exceptions or unexpected logging behavior

data.name: MAD2023_Message
data.value: Invalid braces in message template

data.name: MAD2023_Title
data.value: InvalidBracesInMessageTemplate

data.name: MAD2253_Description
data.value: Named placeholders in the logging message template should not be composed of only numeric characters.

data.name: MAD2253_Message
data.value: Named placeholders should not be numeric values

data.name: MAD2253_Title
data.value: NamedPlaceholdersShouldNotBeNumeric

data.name: MAD2254_Description
data.value: When performing logging, it's desirable to preserve the structure of the log (including placeholder names) along with the placeholder values. Preserving this information allows for better observability and search in log aggregation and monitoring software.

data.name: MAD2254_Message
data.value: Template should be a static expression

data.name: MAD2254_Title
data.value: TemplateShouldBeStatic

data.name: MAD2255_Description
data.value: Exceptions should be passed first to the logger method to enhance root cause analysis for an exception by including proper exception processing with the ability to also print stacktraces.

data.name: MAD2255_Message
data.value: Exceptions should be passed first to the logger method to be able to include the stacktrace in the log.

data.name: MAD2255_Title
data.value: ExceptionsShouldBePassedFirst

data.name: MAD2256_Description
data.value: Calling JsonSerializer.Serialize(), JsonConvert.SerializeObject(), or .ToString() on a complex object before passing it to a NLog logging method produces a flat string and bypasses NLog's structured capture pipeline. Use the '{@Property}' placeholder prefix to let NLog destructure the object, or the '{$Property}' prefix to force explicit stringification. For consistent serialization across all call sites, register a custom IValueFormatter with NLog's configuration. Serializing inline also incurs the serialization cost even when the log level is disabled.

data.name: MAD2256_Message
data.value: Argument '{0}' is serialized inline. Pass the original object and use the '{{@Property}}' destructuring syntax or register a custom NLog IValueFormatter instead.

data.name: MAD2256_Title
data.value: AvoidInlineSerializationInLogArguments
